name: @radzor/document-ocr
description: Extract text and structured data from PDFs, images, and scanned documents. Supports Tesseract (local), Google Vision, and Azure Document Intelligence. Handles multi-page PDFs, tables, and form fields.

inputs.name: provider
inputs.description: OCR provider. tesseract runs locally; google-vision and azure require API credentials.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for Google Vision. Not required for tesseract.

inputs.name: language
inputs.description: Language hint for OCR (ISO 639-3 for Tesseract, BCP-47 for cloud providers).

outputs.name: extractionResult
outputs.type: { text: string; pages: number; confidence: number }
outputs.description: Extracted text, page count, and average confidence score.

outputs.name: structuredData
outputs.type: { tables: object[][]; fields: Record<string, string>; lines: string[] }
outputs.description: Structured extraction result with tables, form fields, and individual text lines.

events.name: onPageExtracted
events.description: Fired when a page is processed.

actions.name: extractText

params.name: input
params.description: Document as Buffer or file path (PDF, PNG, JPEG, TIFF).

actions.returns: Promise<{ text: string; pages: number; confidence: number }>
actions.description: Extract all text from a document or image.

actions.name: extractStructured

params.name: input
params.description: Document as Buffer or file path.

actions.returns: Promise<{ tables: object[][]; fields: Record<string, string>; lines: string[] }>
actions.description: Extract structured data including tables and form fields (cloud providers only).

actions.name: extractPage

params.name: input
params.description: PDF as Buffer or file path.

actions.description: Extract text from a specific page of a PDF.

connectsTo.description: Extract structured fields (invoices, forms) from OCR'd text.
Export OCR'd tables directly to CSV.

llm.constraints: Tesseract requires a local installation (apt-get install tesseract-ocr). Cloud providers require API credentials and network access. extractStructured() is only available for google-vision and azure — tesseract returns plain text only. For large PDFs, process page by page to avoid memory issues.
